name: Kids' Hardside Carry On Spinner Suitcase Daisy - Cat & Jack™️
description:
Add sweet charm to your kid's travel adventures with this Daisy Hardside Carry-On Spinner Suitcase from Cat & Jack™️. This carry-on spinner suitcase features a water-resistant hardside design with a zip closure to keep their belongings protected while traveling. Designed with two interior mesh zippered compartments, it also features an internal organizer for effective packing of their clothes, gadgets and more. Plus, the spinner wheels and the retractable metal handle allow for smooth maneuvering, while the side handle makes carrying by hand easy. It's finished with allover daisy print on a green background for a pop of eye-catching style.

Cat & Jack™: Designed for all children so you can trust it's made for yours.
